requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant type and destination documentation for R-600a
requirement_topic.zh: R-600a制冷剂类型与目的地文件要求
requirement_topic.zht: R-600a製冷劑類型與目的地文件要求

summary.en: Chinese household refrigerators commonly use R-600a in this product lane. In Thailand-facing planning, exporters should still declare refrigerant type, refrigerant charge category, and safety handling points in destination documentation and manuals. The practical rule is that technical acceptability and safety documentation for flammable refrigerants must be traceable per model and can only be represented by Thai-facing documentation at the point of placement.
summary.zh: 本线路中中国家用冰箱常用R-600a。面向泰国时，出口商应在目的地文件和说明书中明确声明制冷剂种类、充注类别和安全处理要点。实践上，含可燃制冷剂的技术适配与安全文件需按机型追溯，并且在泰国投放时应以目的地文件体现。
summary.zht: 本路線中中國家用冰箱常用R-600a。面向泰國時，出口商應在目的地文件和說明書中明確聲明製冷劑種類、充注類別及安全處理要點。實務上，含可燃製冷劑的技術適配與安全文件需按機型追溯，並且在泰國投放時應以目的地文件體現。

standards_or_laws: Product documentation and safety file requirements where flammable refrigerants are used
TISI-directed destination safety and labelling expectations for controlled appliances

summary.en: China commonly permits R-600a for household refrigerators under its domestic environmental and product safety framework, and many Chinese export products align to this refrigerant for efficiency reasons. In this cross-standard lane, no direct refrigerant-type prohibition gap is typically identified for standard R-600a use, but documentation sufficiency is still destination-dependent.
summary.zh: 中国国内环境与产品安全框架下通常允许家用冰箱使用R-600a，且大量中国产品出于能效原因采用该制冷剂。按该对标方向通常不会识别到标准R-600a的直接禁止性差距，但文档充分性仍取决于目的地要求。
summary.zht: 中國國內環境與產品安全框架下通常允許家用冰箱使用R-600a，且大量中國產品出於能效原因採用該製冷劑。按該對標方向通常不會識別到標準R-600a的直接禁止性差距，但文件充分性仍取決於目的地要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 9237 and related refrigerant safety framework references
China environmental and product safety framework for refrigerant selection

gap.en: The gap is mostly on documentation quality and Thai-facing safety expression. Chinese factory records can identify R-600a content, but Thai placement usually needs model-specific phrasing and importer-held evidence that aligns with destination hazard handling and maintenance expectations.
gap.zh: 差距主要在文件质量和泰国语境的安全表述。中国工厂记录可识别R-600a成分，但泰国投放通常还要求按机型表述并由进口方保存符合目的地危险处理和维修要求的证据。
gap.zht: 差距主要在文件質量和泰國語境的安全表述。中國工廠記錄可識別R-600a成分，但泰國投放通常還要求按機型表述並由進口方保存符合目的地危險處理和維修要求的證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for destination placement that treats refrigerant content as part of safety and post-market documentation control. Importers should keep model-specific technical disclosure in place even when R-600a is commonly used.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese domestic conformity documentation where selected household refrigerants are declared under environmental and refrigeration safety governance.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a use itself is generally not the primary barrier in this lane. The destination risk is usually whether Thai-facing safety and maintenance documentation fully reflects refrigerant handling, charge sizing, and importer responsibility.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在本路线中，R-600a本身通常不是核心阻断项，主要风险在于泰国方向的安全和维护文件是否完整覆盖制冷剂处理、充注量说明及进口商责任。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在本路線中，R-600a本身通常不是核心阻斷項，主要風險在於泰國方向的安全和維護文件是否完整覆蓋製冷劑處理、充注量說明及進口商責任。
